title: SCREENWISE-ENROLLING - 211info
text: BEAVERTON WELLNESS CENTER SCREENWISE-ENROLLING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides breast and cervical cancer screenings and/or diagnostics through a network of providers. Helps reduce cancer burden through early detection, risk screening, education, and linkage to medical treatment. 2725 SW Cedar Hills Boulevard Suite 200 Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: -Age 18-39 and needing breast or cervical cancer diagnostic services (determined by clinician) -Age 40 or older needing breast or cervical cancer screening and/or diagnostic services -Must live or intend to live in Oregon - Household income at or below 250% Federal Poverty Level (FPL) -Must be uninsured or have insurance but not enough to cover their needs Men of any age with symptoms of breast cancer are eligible for breast and genetic services. United States citizenship is not required to participate in the ScreenWise program. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-7pm (503) 352-6000 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 352-6000 Screenwise (971) 673-0581 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-7pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet #67 stop at Jenkins & Cedar Hills Crossing Driveway Services: Breast Examinations Breast Self Examination Instruction Mammograms Pap Tests Other Services Offered At This Location: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - PRIMARY CARE HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - BCCTP HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - WELLNESS CENTER HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BEAVERTON WELLNESS CENTER
